Comments, Questions, Suggestions are Always Welcome!

Complete Listing of All Pathguide Resources

Pathguide contains information about 702 biological pathway related resources and molecular interaction related resources. Click on a link to go to the resource home page or 'Details' for a description page. Databases that are free and those supporting BioPAX, CellML, PSI-MI or SBML standards are respectively indicated.

If you know of a pathway resource that is not listed here, or have other questions or comments, please send us an e-mail.

News
Major new update of Pathguide September 2017
We now have information for over 690 resources!
Major new update of Pathguide August 2013
We now have information about ~550 resources!
Visual navigation added May 2010
Click the 'Database interactions' link on the left menu to access.
Major update
All resources were recently reviewed and many new ones were added
Get the Stats
Detailed Pathguide resource statistics now available
Pathguide Published
Please cite the Pathguide Publication

Note on Web Popularity:
As indexed by Google, popularity is estimated by the number of web pages that mention each resource's homepage (subtracting links from the resource itself). This number provides a rough indication of the relative popularity of each resource; this should not be interpreted as an accurate measure of resource significance.
There are a number of reasons why a resource may have no links, such as: it may be a very new resource and no pages link to it yet; it may have been recently relocated and no links point to the new location; it may be a private resource and no links point to the brochure page; it may be a defunct resource without a valid link.
Thanks to Robert Hoffmann for help updating the Google ranking.

"Pathguide: the pathway resource list" is maintained by Gary Bader1.
The website was originally created by Michael Cary 2 and was significantly updated and redesigned by Vuk Pavlovic1.
Thanks to Emek Demir for the Pathguide name.

1. Bader Lab
2. Sander Group
